scenario.title: Lossless authority-aware Worker/store reduction with P07R-001 convergence and P09R-002 detail reprojection
preconditions: P08 versioned view frames declare canonical CursorVector, operation, and authoritative coverage.
P07R-001 ensures an idle same-epoch Goosetower gap repair re-arms on the next runtime Replaying edge and installs continuity before recovery publication.
P09R-002 keeps a current selected-session detail projection authoritative over same-drain summaries after gap_filled and source_snapshot_resync.
Two independent sessions, teams, and processes can publish siblings in one bounded Worker drain.
A persisted v1 browser cache and a restarted gateway generation are available as deterministic fixtures.

expected_runtime: one accepted command remains durable runtime authority
expected_goosetower: same-drain siblings retain explicit operation, coverage, source epoch, and gateway generation; released replay/bootstrap repair converges from floor seq4 to runtime high-water seq7 before gap_filled and authoritative replacement
expected_worker_store: all siblings reduce in order in one publication; gaps freeze before mutation and request scoped repair; stale clears only after a valid repair snapshot
expected_visible: two sessions, teams, and processes remain isolated and converge after authoritative repair
the selected live SessionView regains cwd and worktree ownership from current detail without reload or resubscription

fault_observations.fault: Supervisor restarts the isolated Goosetower generation below the persisted gateway sequence and opens a fresh empty-cache Chromium context.
fault_observations.reconstruction: The Worker discards an incompatible IndexedDB namespace, accepts the newly authenticated gateway generation, and reconstructs only from authoritative snapshots.
fault_observations.expected_visible: No stale cached entity is presented as authority after the restart or in the fresh context.
fault_observations.scope_exclusion: P09 observes reconstruction only and does not claim P10 reconnect lifecycle, subscription cleanup, duplicate-Worker, or empty-composer behavior.

fault_observations.fault: BROWSER-005 held the initial same-epoch replay and fallback bootstrap while runtime fan-in reached row 7; after all retained requests drained and normal live retry resumed, Tower remained gap_detected at floor row 4.
fault_observations.reconstruction: P07R-001 stages replay/bootstrap privately, rejects incomplete or regressive candidates before mutation, re-arms only an idle GapDetected queue on a Replaying edge, then atomically installs seq7 and emits source_gap_filled before one authoritative snapshot_resync coverage replacement. Evidence: tmp/gg/gooseweb-migration/P09/880dc80/attempt-1/repair-release-divergence.redacted.json; sha256 f86fb1e6263c5c03c6dfabc893a8a3ff6b770645e9743ae7e937363c13f1021e.
fault_observations.expected_visible: Source stale state, authority, entities, coverage, and command safety remain frozen through release until the installed seq7 recovery sequence clears them.
fault_observations.scope_exclusion: This is the narrow P07 prerequisite correction P07R-001 at the first divergent Goosetower repair-convergence layer; it changes no runtime contract and claims no P10 lifecycle behavior.

fault_observations.fault: P09-BROWSER-006 forced a same-epoch selected-session gap after cwd/worktree ownership was visible; Tower then published ordered gap_filled, source_snapshot_resync, current authoritative session_detail, and a same-drain session summary, but the rendered SessionView elected the summary and omitted detail-only ownership until reload.
fault_observations.reconstruction: P09R-002 retains the current authoritative detail contributor as the canonical SessionView projection when a same-drain or later summary refreshes shared fields. The deterministic production-Worker smoke proves gap withdrawal, frozen-source non-leakage, one bounded recovery publication, stale clearing only with valid current-generation recovery, and cwd/worktree restoration without reload or resubscription.
fault_observations.expected_visible: The selected live SessionView is connected and shows the repaired cwd/worktree ownership and complete covered detail immediately after the bounded recovery drain.
fault_observations.scope_exclusion: Worker/external-store projection only; no React subscription, reconnect, protocol, Goosetower, runtime, composer, P10, or later-phase redesign.

required: runtime source epoch and sequence remain authoritative
P08 operation and coverage are consumed unchanged
gateway generation is publication authority, not runtime truth
P07R-001 freezes published authority beyond a gap and emits gap_filled before authoritative replacement only after contiguous replay or coherent fallback is installed
explicit stale and coverage replacement plus fail-before-mutation repair
current detail remains the canonical selected-session projection when summary and detail share a bounded recovery drain
does not invent lifecycle, repair, or optimistic canonical entities

golden_goose_acceptance_lessons: pending state is a local overlay

gooselake.reason: P09 changes no runtime record, event, command, migration, or storage authority.

goosetower.reason: P07R-001 is a lead-authorized narrow prerequisite correction at the BROWSER-005 first divergent layer: idle released repairs re-arm on Replaying, stage without publication, and atomically install continuity before gap_filled plus authoritative snapshot replacement.

gooseweb.reason: The active Worker/external store and deterministic smokes retain lossless authority-aware reduction; P09R-002 rebuilds the canonical selected-session SessionView from current detail after bounded gap repair even when a summary follows in the same drain.

auth_account_state.reason: No account, ticket, workspace, permission, or session-cookie behavior changes.

protocol_generated_code.reason: No Protobuf schema or generated artifact changes; P08 typed shapes are preserved.

api_narrative_docs.reason: No runtime HTTP route, OpenAPI artifact, or public narrative API behavior changes.

assertions: the reviewer observes identical authoritative entities after repair at every viewport
composer bottom remains inside the viewport
source-stale safety remains visible and critical actions remain reachable

empty.expectation: Authoritative empty snapshots remove absent covered entities and nested arrays.

loading.expectation: Subscriptions remain subscribing until their exact valid snapshot arrives.

stale_gap_replaying.expectation: Same-epoch jumps freeze before mutation and stale clears only after authoritative fill or resync.

rejection_conflict.expectation: Revision, epoch, generation, operation, and request mismatches request repair without authority mutation.

permission_denied.expectation: Existing command rejection remains a local pending-command overlay.

terminal_error.expectation: Malformed and unknown version/operation frames degrade explicitly before cursor or entity mutation.

default_fixture_leak_assertions: No P09 fake entity enters the default or production UI.
Deterministic frames run only in source-controlled smoke scripts.
The active production Worker and smoke import the same core.
fixtures.gating: No React fixture is added; browser acceptance uses the supervisor-managed real stack.

schema_migration.reason: No runtime, Tower, or protocol schema changes; the browser cache uses a new disposable namespace.

backfill.reason: Browser caches are disposable and are never backfilled as authority.

compatibility.reason: Incompatible cursor/cache namespaces discard and refetch; P08 legacy decoding remains bounded and explicit; P09R-002 changes only in-memory contributor arbitration and requires no persisted cache migration.

rollback.reason: Rollback may discard the v2 browser cache namespace, removes the P07R-001 reconnect-edge re-arm, and restores summary-last SessionView arbitration that reopens P09-BROWSER-006; durable runtime truth remains unaffected.

performance.reason: Entity operations reduce sequentially inside one bounded drain; P07R-001 uses one active repair loop, bounded replay pages/fallback, and one recovery replacement; P09R-002 reprojects only touched session contributors and retains one publication per drain.

security.reason: No credential, ticket, authorization, or secret-bearing data path changes.

data_retention_gc.reason: Only disposable browser cursor data is namespaced; no product retention policy changes.

deployment.reason: No server configuration, topology, or deployment artifact changes.

provenance_reuse.reason: Golden Goose batching, coverage, and projection tests informed invariants; no source was copied.

native_tauri_assumptions_removed.reason: Only authority, batching, coverage, and overlay invariants were referenced.
